translations.advanced.control_vectors_desc: Control vectors allow steering model behavior by adding
translations.advanced.control_vectors_desc2: vector offsets to activations at specific layers.
translations.advanced.tensor_override_desc: Override buffer types for specific tensors by pattern matching.
translations.advanced.speculative_desc: Speculative decoding uses a smaller draft model to generate
translations.advanced.speculative_desc2: candidate tokens that are then verified by the main model.
translations.grammar.json_schema_desc: JSON Schema constrains output to valid JSON matching a schema.
translations.grammar.reasoning_desc: Reasoning format for models with chain-of-thought output.
translations.messages.select_agent: Select an agent to see details
translations.chat.temperature.help:
Temperature (0.0 - 2.0):
Controls randomness in generation.
Lower values make responses more deterministic and logical.
Higher values add creativity but may lead to hallucinations.
translations.chat.top_p.help:
Top P (0.0 - 1.0):
Nucleus sampling method.
Limits token selection to those whose cumulative probability does not exceed P.
For example, 0.9 means only tokens comprising 90% of probability mass are considered.
translations.chat.top_k.help:
Top K:
Limits selection to K most likely next tokens.
Lower values make text more predictable.
Value of 0 or -1 typically disables this option.
translations.chat.min_p.help:
Min P (0.0 - 1.0):
Minimum token probability relative to the most likely token.
Helps cut off unlikely options, improving text coherence.
translations.chat.repeat_penalty.help:
Repeat Penalty (1.0 - 2.0):
Penalizes tokens that have already appeared in the text.
Values above 1.0 reduce the likelihood of repetitions.
translations.chat.presence_penalty.help:
Presence Penalty (-2.0 - 2.0):
Penalty for token presence in text (one-time).
Encourages the model to discuss new topics.
translations.chat.frequency_penalty.help:
Frequency Penalty (-2.0 - 2.0):
Penalty for token frequency.
The more often a token appears, the more it is penalized.
translations.chat.max_tokens.help:
Max Tokens:
Maximum number of tokens the model can generate or process in context.
translations.chat.stop_on_newline.help: If enabled, generation will stop when a newline character appears.
translations.mirostat.mode.help:
Mirostat:
Algorithm for controlling model learning rate during generation.
Allows maintaining text perplexity (surprise) at a set level.
translations.mirostat.tau.help:
Mirostat Tau:
Target entropy (randomness) of text.
Higher values make text more creative/chaotic.
translations.mirostat.eta.help:
Mirostat Eta:
Rate of algorithm adaptation to entropy changes.
translations.rope.scaling.help: RoPE scaling method for extended context
translations.rope.yarn_desc: Yet another RoPE - extended context scaling
translations.rope.yarn.orig_ctx.help: Context size the model was trained on (0 = from model)
translations.rope.config.yarn: YaRN: orig_ctx=%d, ext=%.2f, attn=%.3f, β_slow=%.2f, β_fast=%.2f
translations.performance.debug_mode.help:
Debug Mode:
Enables detailed logging for debugging.
In normal mode, only errors and warnings are shown.
translations.performance.enable_vsync.help:
VSync:
Synchronization with monitor refresh rate.
Eliminates screen tearing but may limit FPS.
translations.performance.target_fps.help:
Target FPS:
Target frame rate.
Lower value saves CPU/GPU resources.
translations.performance.smart_redraw.help:
Smart Redraw:
Redraws interface only on changes.
Saves resources but may cause delays.
translations.performance.log_level.help:
Log detail level:
Debug shows all messages.
translations.performance.cpu_threads.help:
CPU Threads:
Number of CPU threads for processing.
More threads may speed up generation but increase CPU usage.
translations.performance.context_size.help:
Context Size:
Maximum context size in tokens.
Larger context allows model to remember more information but uses more memory.
translations.performance.seed.help:
Random Seed:
Seed for random number generator.
-1 = random seed, fixed value gives reproducible results.
translations.performance.tail_free.help:
Tail Free Sampling:
Reduces influence of unlikely tokens on selection.
Value 1.0 disables this option.
translations.performance.typical.help:
Typical Sampling:
Selects tokens with typical probability.
Value 1.0 disables this option.
